svg.title: Mini Blinky execute cluster and dual stacks
svg.desc: A six-way TOS source mux feeds the 194 shift-register TOS. TOS and NOS feed the 181 ALU; the result returns to the mux. A C-source mux picks between the 181 carry-out and the 194 shift-out bit, feeding the flags, which go to the decode GALs. The data stack exchanges with NOS on push and pop; the return stack takes PC+1 on CALL or TOS on greater-R, and RTOS returns to the TOS mux.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the TOS_SRC mux codes in GAL2_STACKTOP')
